news.paragraph: Salesforce has recently seen its share price dip more than the broader market despite reports of strong cash flow generation. Some market commentary has also suggested doubts regarding the company's outlook in the context of shifting industry dynamics. There are no specific imminent catalysts such as earnings or product launches mentioned in the current headlines.
headlines: Salesforce (CRM) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
